svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="_9PcsCJNGdMS3qP1ucIR" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-489" dy="-215" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) Methods" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;opacity=20;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="190" x="30" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Full Fine-Tuning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="30" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_model" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Pre-trained Model" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="55" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_w1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="All Weights W1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="55" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_w2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="All Weights W2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="55" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_w3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="All Weights W3...Wn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="55" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_arrow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;" value="ALL params updated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="55" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_pros" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#006600;" value="+ Best performance
+ Full control" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="165" x="45" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_cons" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#cc0000;" value="- 100-120GB VRAM (7B)
- Risk of catastrophic
 forgetting
- Very expensive" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="165" x="45" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fft_stat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="~100% params updated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="55" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;opacity=20;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="190" x="240" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="LoRA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="240" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_frozen" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Frozen Base Model" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="265" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_w" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="W (frozen)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="265" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_plus" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="305" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_adapter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="LoRA Adapter
A * B (trainable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="265" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_arrow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#b85450;" value="rank r << d (low-rank decomp)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="170" x="255" y="308" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_pros" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#006600;" value="+ 10-20x less memory
+ No catastrophic forgetting
+ Modular adapters" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="165" x="255" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_cons" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#cc0000;" value="- Still needs FP16 model
- Slightly less accuracy
 than full fine-tuning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="165" x="255" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lora_stat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="~0.1-1% params updated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="265" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;opacity=20;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="190" x="450" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#006600;" value="QLoRA (Recommended)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="450" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_frozen" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="4-bit Quantized
Base Model (NF4)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="475" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_w" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="W (4-bit, frozen)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="475" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_plus" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="515" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_adapter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="LoRA Adapters
BF16 (trainable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="475" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_arrow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#006600;" value="4x less memory vs LoRA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="170" x="465" y="308" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_pros" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#006600;" value="+ Works on single GPU
+ 80% less memory vs FA2
+ 90-95% quality of full FT
+ $1,500 RTX 4090 feasible" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="165" x="465" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_cons" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#cc0000;" value="- Slower than LoRA
- Some precision loss
 from quantization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="165" x="465" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qlora_stat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="~0.1-1% params + 4-bit quant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="475" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;opacity=20;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="190" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="SFT + Alignment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="660" y="88" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Step 1: SFT
Instruction-following data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="680" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_arrow1" edge="1" parent="1" source="sft_step1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="sft_step2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Step 2: Reward Model
Human preference data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="680" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_arrow2" edge="1" parent="1" source="sft_step2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="sft_step3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Step 3a: RLHF / PPO
or Step 3b: DPO
Alignment optimization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="680" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#9673a6;" value="DPO skips reward model,
40-75% less compute" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="170" x="665" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_pros" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#006600;" value="+ Human-aligned output
+ Safer responses
+ Better instruction follow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="165" x="670" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_cons" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#cc0000;" value="- Needs preference data
- Complex pipeline
- DPO: weaker OOD gen." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="165" x="670" y="458" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sft_stat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Used for alignment / safety" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="680" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Relative VRAM Usage (7B model)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="820" x="30" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem_fft" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Full FT: ~120GB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="820" x="30" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem_lora" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="LoRA: ~18GB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="30" y="685" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem_qlora" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="QLoRA: ~6GB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="30" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

forgetting
